source_policy: Public-safe projection only; private acceptance ledgers and release authorization remain outside the public repository.

status_semantics.PASS: A current native end-to-end install/start/invocation journey was observed on a real host and has a public-safe evidence reference.
status_semantics.NOT_RUN: No accepted current-native live-host journey is recorded in this public projection.
status_semantics.FAIL: A current native end-to-end journey was attempted and failed with a public-safe evidence reference.
status_semantics.BLOCKED: A current native end-to-end journey was attempted but host policy, permissions, or environment prevented completion; a public-safe evidence reference is required.

codex.product_path: Git marketplace plugin install -> trust bundled SessionStart hook -> start a new thread -> invoke an installed Hakim skill

claude-code.product_path: Git marketplace plugin install -> start Claude Code -> invoke a Hakim command or plugin agent

github-copilot.product_path: Git marketplace plugin install -> verify installed skills/agents -> invoke a Hakim skill or agent

opencode.product_path: Guarded project-local install -> start OpenCode from the target project -> invoke a Hakim command/skill
